name: How do I calculate my average weekly wage for settlement?
description: Total earnings last 52 weeks ÷ 52 = AWW. Includes OT, bonuses, tips. Lawyer verifies calculation.

mainEntity.name: How do I calculate my average weekly wage for settlement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Total earnings last 52 weeks ÷ 52 = AWW. Includes OT, bonuses, tips. Lawyer verifies calculation.
